summary: Comprehensive testing of Company Documents page completed. All features working correctly. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tabs and features verified including role-specific expense limits.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/expense-master/policy requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/expense-master/policy returns categories with expense_types
Backend: Travel category exists with 8 expense types
Backend: Accommodation category exists with 4 expense types
Backend: Meals & Entertainment category exists with 3 expense types
Backend: Expense type structure includes id, name, default_limit, role_limit, requires_receipt, is_allowed_for_role
Backend: Categories have policy_guidelines field
Backend: CEO gets 5x multiplier (Domestic Flight: ₹75,000)
Backend: Partner - Sales gets 1.2x multiplier (Domestic Flight: ₹18,000)
Backend: CEO vs Partner limits are different (ratio ~4.17)
Backend: International Flight limits correct (CEO: ₹5,00,000, Partner: ₹1,20,000)
Backend: Categories have icon and color fields for UI
Backend: Expense types have requires_receipt and requires_justification flags
Backend: All expected travel expense types exist
Backend: All accommodation expense types exist
Backend: All meals expense types exist
Frontend: Company Documents page loads at /company-documents
Frontend: data-testid='company-documents' present
Frontend: 5 tabs displayed (Overview, Travel Policy, Leave Policy, Incentive Policy, Payslips)
Frontend: Overview tab shows 8 document categories
Frontend: 4 available categories (Travel, Leave, Incentive, Payslips)
Frontend: 4 Coming Soon categories (HR Policies, Compliance, Handbook, Org Structure)
Frontend: Travel Policy tab shows role-specific limits
Frontend: Policy guidelines displayed for each category
Frontend: Table columns: Expense Type, Your Limit, Receipt Required, Justification, Status
Frontend: Leave Policy tab shows Casual, Sick, Earned, Public Holidays
Frontend: Special Leaves table shows Maternity, Paternity, Bereavement, Marriage
Frontend: Incentive Policy tab shows Monthly Targets, Quarterly Bonuses, Annual Awards
Frontend: Payslips tab shows Salary Structure with Earnings and Deductions
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Company Documents' under Documents section
Frontend: CEO login shows ₹75,000 Domestic Flight limit
Frontend: Partner - Sales login shows ₹18,000 Domestic Flight limit
seed_data_creation: Expense categories and types auto-initialized with default data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company Documents page fully functional at /company-documents. Travel Policy tab dynamically fetches role-specific limits from /api/expense-master/policy. CEO gets 5x multiplier, Partner-Sales gets 1.2x. Leave, Incentive, and Payslips tabs have static content. Navigation sidebar has 'Company Documents' under Documents section.
